race.description: Gundagai Community Race Day Sprint Hcp (Bm50)
race.comment: TEA OR COFFEE (6) saluted at Queanbeyan two runs ago. Not disgraced last time out when prominent at the bend before finishing fourth over 1400m at Corowa. Finds a suitable assignment and can return to winning ways with the claim. TERESPRIT (8) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start when she settled well back over 1200m at Narrandera, beaten 6 lengths into seventh. Suitably placed and anticipating a big run this time. ANTHRACIA (3) has been out of the placings in two runs since a break, the latest when sixth over 1010m at Moruya. Cherry-ripe now and can find peak form this time. DENSETSU (2) finished seventh over 1100m at Bendigo last time out after a gutsy win two runs back. Has the speed to overcome the draw. Not to be discounted.
